description: Fair cross-lab comparison scenario with fixed duration and payload size.

comparison_profile.objective: Compare the deployable blueprint against the Lab 10 microservices mesh.

workload_model.payload_shape: Same fixed-size benchmark payload as earlier labs, routed through the deployable gateway stack.
workload_model.concurrency_model: Deterministic virtual users with one message every 1000 ms in the comparison run.

metrics_contract.latency: Client-observed end-to-end latency across gateway and backend services.
metrics_contract.error_rate: Dropped messages plus DB errors divided by total processed messages.
metrics_contract.db_latency: Database query latency when message and history services persist data.

traceability.contract: trace_id and message_id propagate through gateway, message service, history service, and storage.
traceability.propagation: Client -> gateway -> message service -> database -> gateway/history service.

consistency_model.notes: The write path is durable and visible through one deployable control plane with metrics and dashboards.

failure_model.focus: Dependency degradation, rate-limit pressure, and service recovery under observability.

routing_strategy.policy: Gateway-mediated routing with service-specific downstream ownership and standardized control-plane tooling.
routing_strategy.objective: Consolidate the strongest ideas from the previous labs into one deployable local blueprint.

observability.baseline: Prometheus, Grafana, benchmark artifacts, and structured container logs via Docker Compose.
observability.logging: Trace IDs support end-to-end message follow-through across services and dashboards.

cost_model.dominant_axis: Service-to-service hops, database writes, broker overhead, and operational complexity.
cost_model.notes: The blueprint is the most capable stack in the series and intentionally carries the highest platform cost.

synthesis.scaling_inflection: The architecture becomes deployable as a repeatable blueprint, but platform discipline becomes mandatory.
synthesis.learning_goal: End the curriculum with a runnable reference stack that prioritizes clarity, observability, and operational readiness.

comparison_standard.description: Fair cross-lab comparison scenario with fixed duration and payload size.

blueprint_validation.description: Validate the production-grade blueprint under a modest steady load.
